components.component_overview: The Configuration component manages server settings, SSL/TLS security parameters, and IRC channel configurations for the ngIRCd daemon, organizing data into server operations, SSL options, and channel-specific settings.

components.component_overview: The Infrastructure / Platform component of ngIRCd is a foundational system responsible for managing server lifecycle, resource allocation, and low-level I/O operations. It orchestrates the initialization of the IRC daemon, handles process management via forks and signal handling, manages client connections through reference counting, and provides the core event loop mechanisms using various I/O libraries.

subcomponents.subcomponent_description: System-level process lifecycle control, signal handling, and resource allocation for the server.
